creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems /usr/bin/c++ either hangs or loops infinitely while building old versions of llvm:

http://gohan2.ysv.freebsd.org/data/head-amd64-default-baseline/p446433_s321376/logs/errors/llvm35-3.5.2_4.log
